reasoning: The Philadelphia Eagles are the defending Super Bowl LIX champions and are having a strong 2025 regular season. They opened as favorites (+600, ~14%) but fell slightly over the season. According to Polymarket history, their true market price on Oct 30 was 9%. After Oct 30, they entered a Week 9 bye at 6-2, but results from around the league propelled them to the No. 1 seed in the NFC (due to losses by competitors). Their price should therefore have slightly increased from 9% to around 11% by November 9 due to improving position in the playoff picture. I am setting the probability at 11%.
